title: Lively Zesty Uruguayan Prawns Ceviche
description: Pungent, springy, weeknight Uruguayan ceviche featuring raw king prawns, brine-wet and ovo-vegetarian-friendly, served on a hot-stone plate.
instructions: Rinse the peeled king prawns under cold water and pat dry with a paper towel.

Place the prawns in a shallow glass bowl and pour the lime juice and 100ml water over them, ensuring the prawns stay wet; cover and refrigerate for 10 minutes to allow the acidity to lightly cure the seafood.
While the prawns marinate, dice the red bell pepper, slice the red onion, seed and dice the tomato, and chop the cilantro.
After marination, drain the prawns, reserving a tablespoon of the citrus liquid to keep them juicy; transfer the prawns to a new bowl.
Add the diced vegetables, cilantro, garlic powder, smoked paprika, sea salt, black pepper, and hot sauce to the prawns, tossing gently to combine.
Taste the ceviche, adjusting salt or lime if needed, then stir in the reserved citrus liquid to maintain moisture.
Preheat a hot stone plate over medium heat until it glows hot, then lightly oil it with a paper towel dipped in olive oil to prevent sticking.
Spoon the ceviche onto the hot stone, letting it sit for 2-3 minutes before serving, which gives a pleasant springy texture.
